description: Create bilingual (PL/EN) landing page for FOODLAW.ai using Astro + Tailwind CSS in website/ directory. Includes hero, features, demo placeholder, pricing teaser, waitlist form, footer, and language switcher.
steps: Initialize Astro project in website/ directory with pnpm: run `pnpm create astro@latest website -- --template minimal --no-install` then cd website && pnpm install && pnpm add tailwindcss @astrojs/tailwind

Configure Tailwind CSS with Astro integration in website/astro.config.mjs. Create website/tailwind.config.mjs with dark mode support and custom color palette (legal-tech aesthetic: deep blues, whites, accent golds/greens)

Create i18n system: website/src/i18n/translations.ts with PL and EN translation objects covering all page sections (hero headline, features, pricing, waitlist, footer). Create a language utility to detect/switch locale.
Create main layout: website/src/layouts/Layout.astro with HTML boilerplate, Tailwind imports, meta tags, responsive design, language html attribute
Create language switcher component: website/src/components/LanguageSwitcher.astro - PL/EN toggle button in the header/nav area
Create Hero section component: website/src/components/Hero.astro - communicates AI-powered food law assistant, bilingual headline/subheadline, CTA button
Create Features section component: website/src/components/Features.astro - cards/grid showing: knowledge base of 19+ areas of food law, automated legal research, EU and Polish regulations coverage
Create Demo section component: website/src/components/Demo.astro - screenshot/demo placeholder with placeholder image area and descriptive text
Create Pricing section component: website/src/components/Pricing.astro - freemium concept teaser with planned tiers hint
Create Waitlist section component: website/src/components/Waitlist.astro - email signup form with placeholder action (form posts to # or shows success message via JS)
Create Footer component: website/src/components/Footer.astro - links to supplemental.pl, copyright, legal disclaimer
Create index pages: website/src/pages/index.astro (default PL) and website/src/pages/en/index.astro (EN version) assembling all components with proper translations
Add global CSS styles in website/src/styles/global.css for custom styling beyond Tailwind (gradients, transitions, dark/light mode toggle)
Run `pnpm build` in website/ to verify the site builds without errors
acceptance_criteria: website/ directory contains a complete Astro project that builds successfully with `pnpm build`
Both PL (index.astro) and EN (en/index.astro) pages exist with correct translations
Language switcher links between PL and EN versions
All sections present: hero, features (19+ areas, automated research, EU+PL regs), demo placeholder, pricing teaser, waitlist form, footer with supplemental.pl link
Design uses Tailwind CSS with professional legal-tech aesthetic
Site is fully static (no server-side rendering needed)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/foodlaw.ai/website && pnpm build` and confirm exit code 0 and dist/ directory created with HTML files
